sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR, timestamp TIMESTAMP, interval_col INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'test1', TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00', INTERVAL 1 HOUR), (2, 'test2', TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 01:00:00', INTERVAL 2 HOUR);
SELECT repeat_row(value, 2, id, 'bar', num_rows = 5) AS repeated_values FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT value, repeat_row(value, 3, id) AS repeated_id FROM test_table ORDER BY TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00' - INTERVAL 1 HOUR;
WITH repeated_data AS (SELECT repeat_row('foo', 2, id) AS r FROM test_table) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repeated_data;
SELECT id, repeat_row(value, 3, id) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id - 1 < 2);
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, repeat_row(value, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS new_value FROM test_table;
SELECT value, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT repeat_row('value', 2, id, 'new') as value FROM test_table) AS subquery GROUP BY value HAVING value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, MAX(timestamp) - INTERVAL 1 HOUR FROM test_table WHERE timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 01:00:00' GROUP BY value;
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE interval_col IS NULL OR id - repeat_row(1, 2, 1) IS NOT NULL;
